task_description: You are auditing the creator network from lead channel ch_titan_01. ch_titan_01 is active and has an audit note saying the network has profile-upkeep issues and featured-link reciprocity issues. It features ch_titan_02, ch_titan_03, and ch_titan_04. ch_titan_02 Titan Gaming and ch_titan_03 Titan Vlogs are active but lack profile details needed to pass the audit; both have reciprocal featured links back to ch_titan_01. ch_titan_04 Titan Tech is active, has desc Tech, but has only a one-directional featured relationship from ch_titan_01 and needs reciprocal confirmation. Choose exactly one option. Option A: identify all compliance violations, suspend every related channel whose profile is not up to date, and remove featured links that lack a verified bidirectional counterpart. Option B: map the network, update the stale profiles with baseline compliance data, and add the missing reciprocal featured relationship so the group remains active and compliant. Answer with only A or B, followed by a brief reason.
